heading: Capitalization
label: 2146 Capitalization
text: In accordance with , each consolidated bank shall provide, through bylaws and subject to Farm Credit Administration regulations, for the capitalization of the bank and the manner in which bank stock shall be issued, held, transferred, and retired and bank earnings distributed.section 2154a of this title
notes: Amendments1988— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The board of directors of the consolidated bank shall provide for the capitalization of such bank in accordance with the provisions of .”Pub. L. 100–399section 2154a of this title

Effective Date of 1988 AmendmentAmendment by effective as if enacted immediately after enactment of , which was approved , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 100–399Pub. L. 100–233section 1001(a) of Pub. L. 100–399section 2002 of this titleJan. 6, 1988
